dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires daily pivot levels applied to intraday chart. Entry conditions: price opens below central pivot AND stays below it (approximated by close remaining below pivot). Exit condition inferred as reversal above pivot (AUTHOR_SILENT). Used 'pivot' indicator which represents the central pivot point. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% for intraday short trade. Hold time limited to 5 days maximum for regime-based signal.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires daily pivot levels applied to intraday chart. Entry conditions: price opens below central pivot AND stays below it (approximated by close remaining below pivot). Exit condition inferred as reversal above pivot (AUTHOR_SILENT). Used 'pivot' indicator which represents the central pivot point. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% for intraday short trade. Hold time limited to 5 days maximum for regime-based signal.

source_rule_text: When price opens and stays below the central pivot from the beginning of the day, it signals weakness; short the stock as price will likely fall further.
